name: PFPanel
description: Structural surface for grouped controls, context, or supporting information.
responsibility: Provide a structural surface for grouped controls, context, or supporting information.

requirements: Panel headings must preserve semantic structure.
Collapsible panels must expose expanded and collapsed state.
Action areas must retain keyboard access.

composition_rules: Use panels for grouped supporting context rather than the dominant workspace.
Panel actions must serve the panel body and not replace app-level navigation.
System and intelligence variants should remain calm unless state requires emphasis.
anti_patterns: placing primary navigation inside arbitrary panels
